📢《Me Yapping 》📢

|

\/

GUYS I think it might have been of me Yapping about the new Avatar movie( Avatar Fire and Ash) that comes out this month. But my brother bought tickets for me, him, and our parents to go see it BEFORE THE RELEASE DATE!

IMMA DIE OF EXCITEMENT!

Anyways then they tell me that they bought the 3rd add on to the Avatar Frontiers of Pandora game on my Brother's PS5, so qhen that comes out I get to play it. YAAAAAY!

Also I'm making bots of All theses lovely aliens in blue before it gets old, and I love making bots there fun.. sometimes.

⚠️《 Important 》⚠️

|

\/

All of theses beautiful majestic aliens in blue take a day or two to make, and a bunch of work is put in every part of the bot. Also I might change them when I need to make them better, but please tell me if it needs adjustments so you guys can enjoy it without issues. And lastly maybe tell me your favorite character from the Avatar movies, I love to know loves.

😘🫶
